scripts.build:wasm:tract-onnx-mt: echo 'build:wasm:tract-onnx-mt is intentionally unsupported: wasm threads need a nightly build-std (+atomics) toolchain, and measurements show threads give no gain on these small per-sentence matmuls (Tract also does not parallelize a single forward pass). See docs/our-findings.md.' && exit 1
scripts.build:wasm:candle-native-st: echo 'build:wasm:candle-native-st is not implemented yet: it would run the model via candle-transformers BERT from safetensors (not ONNX), unlocking quantized models. See docs/our-findings.md.' && exit 1
scripts.build:wasm:candle-native-mt: echo 'build:wasm:candle-native-mt is not implemented yet (and wasm threads have shown no gain). See docs/our-findings.md.' && exit 1
